statement: In every magma, Equation 1595 (`x = (y * z) * (z * (z * y))`) implies Equation 798 (`x = y * (z * ((w * y) * z))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0735
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op z (op z y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op w y) z)))
